title: cleome erosa
intro: Cleome erosa, also known as the pink bee flower or pink spider flower, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is a member of the Cleomaceae family and is known for its clusters of small, fragrant flowers that attract bees and other pollinators. The medicinal properties of Cleome erosa include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cleome erosa include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in oil or water.
